title: Totem Shielded
description: Combines the Totem of Undying with a shield into one item
body:
🛡️ Totem Shielded – Survival Reinvented

Totem Shielded is a lightweight datapack that merges the power of the Totem of Undying with the functionality of a Shield, giving players a seamless way to protect themselves without sacrificing their off-hand slot.

  • ⚔️ Enhanced Survival: Your shield now saves your life just like a Totem of Undying.

    • Whether you're deep in a dungeon or facing a surprise creeper ambush, Totem Shielded ensures you're always one step away from survival. No more juggling items—just pure protection.

    🎨 Note: To see the custom texture for the Totem Shield, make sure to install the included resource pack! but you dont must
